head: 5e29c7b

p72_incident.description: During P72 post-merge verification, `git reset --hard origin/main` overwrote local live DB
p72_incident.root_cause: local live DB (lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db) is git-tracked; `git reset --hard` reverted file to origin/main committed state, discarding 9000 locally-applied rows
p72_incident.recovery_result: rows = 46960, drift guard PASS, branch governance PASS

root_cause: lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db is tracked by git; local live inserts accumulate as unstaged diffs; any `git reset --hard` is destructive when local DB is authoritative and ahead of committed state

required_pre_apply_backup_gate.description: Before any `YES apply P71 controlled replay rows` authorization is acted upon, the following gate must pass
steps: 1. Record current row count: sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays;' — must equal 46960
3. Verify backup row count equals source: sqlite3 <backup_path> 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays;' — must equal 46960
4. Record backup path in apply evidence JSON
5. Verify three reference controlled_apply_ids are present (1500 rows each)
8. Only then proceed with controlled apply

preferred_commands: git diff HEAD origin/main --name-only  (check what differs)
forbidden_commands: git reset --hard origin/main  (FORBIDDEN when local DB is authoritative)
git reset --hard  (FORBIDDEN unless explicit reset-hard authorization present and DB backup verified)
safe_post_merge_verification.safe_merge_path: If local branch must be fast-forwarded to origin/main: (1) verify DB backup exists, (2) get explicit `YES reset hard after verified DB backup` authorization, (3) only then run `git reset --hard origin/main`
safe_post_merge_verification.post_merge_db_check: After any git sync operation: immediately run `sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays;'` and verify row count == 46960

apply_authorization_gate.required_phrase: YES apply P71 controlled replay rows
additional_requirements: drift_guard must PASS immediately before apply
branch_governance must PASS immediately before apply
api_verification must confirm rows served correctly

recommended_next_apply_scope.rationale: Smallest risk surface; POWER_LOTTO; ACTIVE/ONLINE lifecycle; no duplicate ID risk; no RETIRED gate needed
recommended_next_apply_scope.midfreq_fourier_2bet_gate: BLOCKED until lottery_type=DAILY_539 filter verified and post-apply POWER_LOTTO row count confirmed = 1500

batch_risk_table.notes: Ready for P74 apply; safe first wave
Ready for P74 apply after Batch A verified

batch_risk_table.block_reason: RETIRED lifecycle requires explicit lifecycle_promotion_gate before production apply
batch_risk_table.midfreq_fourier_2bet_extra_risk: midfreq_fourier_2bet: dual strategy_id risk; must enforce WHERE lottery_type = 'DAILY_539'; post-apply verify POWER_LOTTO rows still = 1500

batch_risk_table.block_reason: RETIRED lifecycle requires explicit lifecycle_promotion_gate before production apply

p6_sync_debt: NOT resolved in P73; requires separate explicit authorization
